mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reactions (user_id, target_type, target_id, type) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, 'LIKE')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM reactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reactions WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reports (reporter_id, target_type, target_id, reason) VALUES (#{reporterId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reason})
